clue: I'm long, firm, and useful when things need screwing into place.
hints: You might find me in a toolbox.

clue: You grip me with two hands, slide me in and out of a hot space, and I come out perfectly golden when done right.
I'm inflated to just the right firmness, and people fight over who gets to squeeze me.
hints: Michael Jordan was very fond of me.

clue: You thrust me repeatedly into the earth and I help things grow. The harder you push, the better the results.
Everyone in the office has handled me at some point. I leave a mark wherever I go.
hints: APPROVED is one of my most common impressions.

clue: When you need relief fast, you reach for me and push down firmly.
hints: You hope you never urgently need me, but you always have one nearby.

clue: You blow into me, cover my holes with your fingers, and the longer you play, the better the tune.
hints: Jethro Tull is famous for playing me.

clue: I get slippery when heated and need to be handled carefully or I'll slide right off the pan.
I'm thick, long, driven in with force, and I hold everything together when used properly.
hints: Hammers and I are best friends.

clue: You grab me at both ends, pull me back as far as you can, and then let go with maximum power.
hints: Gyms and physical therapists love recommending me.

clue: You need to squeeze me regularly to keep healthy. Doctors recommend doing it yourself at home.
You pump me up and down to get the liquid flowing, and I leave everything sparkling.
hints: Hands are cleaner after using me.

clue: You thrust me repeatedly into soft, yielding dough until it's firm and smooth.
hints: This is a step in bread-making.
Bakers' arms get a workout doing this.

clue: You shift me between positions to change the power and speed of what you're riding.
hints: Manual transmissions require frequent use of me.

clue: You have to work the pole in and out while keeping everything straight so nothing collapses on you.
hints: Camping enthusiasts do this at every campsite.

clue: You cast out, wait patiently, then tug the line and start reeling in your catch.
You stroke me up and down, applying just the right pressure to produce a beautiful long note.
You push me back and forth vigorously across the floor until everything is smooth and the surface gleams.
hints: Cinderella used one before the ball.

clue: I have a long shaft, a pointed tip, and I slide into the subject to extract what's inside.
hints: Doctors and nurses use me daily.

clue: You squeeze me tight to get the good stuff out. The harder you press, the more satisfying the result.
I'm wet, flexible, and you slide me across a flat surface to leave your mark.
You push my head down firmly and I punch a neat little hole through whatever's underneath.
You stick me through small holes repeatedly to fasten things together.
You bang on me rhythmically, and the harder you hit, the more everyone feels it.
You squeeze my trigger and I shoot a fast stream of heated liquid wherever you aim.
